input: 帮我写一个workflow,让主机A和主机B的PG两个节点可以通过主机C的pg_mon形成PG集群
expectedBehavior: routes the request into the controlled workflow generation flow even without explicit @add_workflow
builds on reusable operations workflow generation contracts and understands pg_mon as a monitor role in the user environment, not as a required built-in integration
asks for unclear primary/standby role, PostgreSQL version, data_dir, port, replication secret ref, and pg_mon install/config mode
returns a confirmable workflow plan before generating executable nodes
generates parameterized Runner Workflow graph with preflight, execute, verify, and rollback phases
uses static and Docker or live validation when a real test environment is provided
keeps the generated workflow as draft or pending review until proof and human review pass
forbiddenClaims: the workflow is production verified before validation
the generated workflow can overwrite existing PostgreSQL data without approval
plain-text replication password is embedded in the workflow
the workflow generator is hardcoded only for this PostgreSQL scenario
